name: SillyTavern
author: SillyTavern Team
description: SillyTavern is a user interface you can install on your computer (and Android phones) that allows you to interact with text generation AIs and chat/roleplay with characters you or the community create.

name: Clewd
author: teralomaniac
description: Claude to OpenAI API server adapter. Designed to be used with SillyTavern or other API frontends.

name: CLIProxyAPI 代理
author: router-for-me
description: CLIProxyAPI 是一个由 Go 编写的高性能代理工具，支持远程管理和 WebUI 后台，非常适合在手机端作为代理中转使用。

name: GCLI2API
author: su-kaka
description: GCLI2API 用于将 GeminiCLI 和 Antigravity 转换为 OpenAI、GEMINI 和 Claude API 兼容接口，方便客户端接入使用。

name: OpenAI Codex CLI
author: OpenAI / DioNanos
description: OpenAI 官方终端 AI 编程助手。支持自动适配 Termux 社区保活补丁，暂不支持 Windows。
